```html
            {
              date: "2023-02-16",
              cloudCoverage: 38,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-17",
              cloudCoverage: 34,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-18",
              cloudCoverage: 31,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-19",
              cloudCoverage: 35,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-20",
              cloudCoverage: 29,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-21",
              cloudCoverage: 32,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-22",
              cloudCoverage: 27,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-23",
              cloudCoverage: 33,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-24",
              cloudCoverage: 25,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-25",
              cloudCoverage: 28,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-26",
              cloudCoverage: 22,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-27",
              cloudCoverage: 18,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-06",
              cloudCoverage: 47,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-13",
              cloudCoverage: 25,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-14",
              cloudCoverage: 28,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-15",
              cloudCoverage: 23,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-16",
              cloudCoverage: 26,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-17",
              cloudCoverage: 21,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-18",
              cloudCoverage: 24,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-19",
              cloudCoverage: 19,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-20",
              cloudCoverage: 9,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-27",
              cloudCoverage: 38,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-03",
              cloudCoverage: 22,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-10",
              cloudCoverage: 51,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-17",
              cloudCoverage: 14,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-21",
              cloudCoverage: 29,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-22",
              cloudCoverage: 27,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-23",
              cloudCoverage: 26,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-24",
              cloudCoverage: 29,
            },
          ],
          timeControlProperty: "TIME",
        },
        source: {
          type: "TileWMS",
          url: "https://services.sentinel-hub.com/ogc/wms/0635c213-17a1-48ee-aef7-9d1731695a54",
          params: {
            LAYERS: "AWS_NO2-VISUALISATION",
            TIME: "2022-12-05",
          },
          crossOrigin: "anonymous",
        },
      },
    ],
  });

  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrolDate, {
    format: "YYYY-MM-DD",
    navigation: true,
  });

  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrolPicker, {
    format: "YYYY-MM-DD",
    showDots: true,
    popup: true,
    showItems: true,
  });
</script>

```

#### DatePickerStandalone

Calendar date picker displayed inline (not in popup mode)
This example shows the `<eox-timecontrol-picker>` component without the `popup` attribute,
displaying the calendar inline within the component. Useful for always-visible date selection
interfaces.

```html
<eox-timecontrol for="eox-map#date-picker-standalone">
  <eox-timecontrol-picker></eox-timecontrol-picker>
</eox-timecontrol>
<eox-map id="date-picker-standalone"></eox-map>

<script type="module">
  import "@eox/timecontrol/dist/eox-timecontrol.js";
  import "@eox/map/dist/eox-map.js";

  const eoxTimecontrol = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol");
  const eoxMap = document.querySelector("eox-map");
  const eoxTimecontrolPicker = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol-picker");

  // Assign properties
  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrol, {
    layerIdKey: "id",
    select: (e) => {
      console.log(e.detail);
    },
  });

  Object.assign(eoxMap, {
    zoom: 5,
    center: [1000000, 6000000],
    layers: [
      {
        type: "Tile",
        properties: {
          id: "OSM",
        },
        source: {
          type: "OSM",
        },
      },
      {
        type: "Tile",
        properties: {
          id: "AWS_VIS_WIND_V_10M",
          name: "Wind Visualisation 10M",
          timeControlValues: [
            {
              date: "2022-12-05",
              cloudCoverage: 20,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-07",
              cloudCoverage: 68,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-08",
              cloudCoverage: 72,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-09",
              cloudCoverage: 65,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-10",
              cloudCoverage: 58,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-11",
              cloudCoverage: 61,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-12",
              cloudCoverage: 55,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-13",
              cloudCoverage: 63,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-01",
              cloudCoverage: 33,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-02",
              cloudCoverage: 28,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-03",
              cloudCoverage: 31,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-04",
              cloudCoverage: 36,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-05",
              cloudCoverage: 42,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-06",
              cloudCoverage: 38,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-07",
              cloudCoverage: 34,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-08",
              cloudCoverage: 40,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-09",
              cloudCoverage: 45,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-10",
              cloudCoverage: 39,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-01",
              cloudCoverage: 52,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-02",
              cloudCoverage: 48,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-03",
              cloudCoverage: 55,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-04",
              cloudCoverage: 61,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-05",
              cloudCoverage: 58,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-06",
              cloudCoverage: 64,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-07",
              cloudCoverage: 59,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-08",
              cloudCoverage: 67,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-09",
              cloudCoverage: 71,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-10",
              cloudCoverage: 68,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-11",
              cloudCoverage: 73,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-12",
              cloudCoverage: 69,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-13",
              cloudCoverage: 75,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-14",
              cloudCoverage: 72,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-15",
              cloudCoverage: 66,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-16",
              cloudCoverage: 70,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-17",
              cloudCoverage: 74,
            },
          ],
          timeControlProperty: "TIME",
        },
        source: {
          type: "TileWMS",
          url: "https://services.sentinel-hub.com/ogc/wms/0635c213-17a1-48ee-aef7-9d1731695a54",
          params: {
            LAYERS: "AWS_VIS_WIND_V_10M",
            TIME: "2022-12-05",
          },
          crossOrigin: "anonymous",
        },
      },
      {
        type: "Tile",

          id: "AWS_NO2-VISUALISATION",
          name: "NO2 Visualisation",
          timeControlValues: [
            {
              date: "2022-12-05",
              cloudCoverage: 20,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-06",
              cloudCoverage: 18,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-07",
              cloudCoverage: 22,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-08",
              cloudCoverage: 25,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-09",
              cloudCoverage: 19,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-10",
              cloudCoverage: 16,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-11",
              cloudCoverage: 21,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-12",
              cloudCoverage: 15,

              date: "2023-02-18",
              cloudCoverage: 31,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-19",
              cloudCoverage: 35,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-20",
              cloudCoverage: 29,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-21",
              cloudCoverage: 32,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-22",
              cloudCoverage: 27,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-23",
              cloudCoverage: 33,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-24",
              cloudCoverage: 25,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-25",
              cloudCoverage: 28,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-26",
              cloudCoverage: 22,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-27",
              cloudCoverage: 18,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-06",
              cloudCoverage: 47,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-13",
              cloudCoverage: 25,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-14",
              cloudCoverage: 28,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-15",
              cloudCoverage: 23,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-16",
              cloudCoverage: 26,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-17",
              cloudCoverage: 21,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-18",
              cloudCoverage: 24,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-19",
              cloudCoverage: 19,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-20",
              cloudCoverage: 9,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-27",
              cloudCoverage: 38,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-03",
              cloudCoverage: 22,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-10",
              cloudCoverage: 51,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-17",
              cloudCoverage: 14,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-21",
              cloudCoverage: 29,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-22",
              cloudCoverage: 27,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-23",
              cloudCoverage: 26,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-24",
              cloudCoverage: 29,
            },
          ],
          timeControlProperty: "TIME",
        },
        source: {
          type: "TileWMS",
          url: "https://services.sentinel-hub.com/ogc/wms/0635c213-17a1-48ee-aef7-9d1731695a54",
          params: {
            LAYERS: "AWS_NO2-VISUALISATION",
            TIME: "2022-12-05",
          },
          crossOrigin: "anonymous",
        },
      },
    ],
  });

  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrolPicker, {
    format: "YYYY-MM-DD",
    showDots: true,
  });
</script>

```

#### DateWithInitDate

Date display component with init date
This example shows the `<eox-timecontrol-date>` component with the `initDate` property added,
which sets the initial date range. Also, it uses the date `format` of `D. MMMM YYYY`.

```html
<eox-timecontrol for="eox-map#date-with-init-date" initDate='["2021-02-28"]'>
  <eox-timecontrol-date></eox-timecontrol-date>
</eox-timecontrol>
<eox-map id="date-with-init-date"></eox-map>

<script type="module">
  import "@eox/timecontrol/dist/eox-timecontrol.js";
  import "@eox/map/dist/eox-map.js";

  const eoxTimecontrol = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol");
  const eoxMap = document.querySelector("eox-map");
  const eoxTimecontrolDate = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol-date");

  // Assign properties
  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrol, {
    select: (e) => {
      console.log(e.detail);
    },
  });

  Object.assign(eoxMap, {
    zoom: 5,
    center: [1000000, 6000000],
    layers: [
      {
        type: "Tile",
        properties: {
          id: "OSM",
        },
        source: {
          type: "OSM",
        },
      },
      {
        type: "Tile",
        properties: {
          id: "AWS_VIS_WIND_V_10M",
          name: "Wind Visualisation 10M",
          timeControlValues: [
            {
              date: "2022-12-05",
              cloudCoverage: 20,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-07",
              cloudCoverage: 68,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-08",
              cloudCoverage: 72,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-09",
              cloudCoverage: 65,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-10",
              cloudCoverage: 58,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-11",
              cloudCoverage: 61,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-12",
              cloudCoverage: 55,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-13",
              cloudCoverage: 63,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-01",
              cloudCoverage: 33,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-02",
              cloudCoverage: 28,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-03",
              cloudCoverage: 31,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-04",
              cloudCoverage: 36,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-05",
              cloudCoverage: 42,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-06",
              cloudCoverage: 38,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-07",
              cloudCoverage: 34,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-08",
              cloudCoverage: 40,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-09",
              cloudCoverage: 45,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-10",
              cloudCoverage: 39,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-01",
              cloudCoverage: 52,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-02",
              cloudCoverage: 48,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-03",
              cloudCoverage: 55,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-04",
              cloudCoverage: 61,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-05",
              cloudCoverage: 58,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-06",
              cloudCoverage: 64,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-07",
              cloudCoverage: 59,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-08",
              cloudCoverage: 67,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-09",
              cloudCoverage: 71,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-10",
              cloudCoverage: 68,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-11",
              cloudCoverage: 73,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-12",
              cloudCoverage: 69,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-13",
              cloudCoverage: 75,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-14",
              cloudCoverage: 72,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-15",
              cloudCoverage: 66,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-16",
              cloudCoverage: 70,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-17",
              cloudCoverage: 74,
            },
          ],
          timeControlProperty: "TIME",
        },
        source: {
          type: "TileWMS",
          url: "https://services.sentinel-hub.com/ogc/wms/0635c213-17a1-48ee-aef7-9d1731695a54",
          params: {
            LAYERS: "AWS_VIS_WIND_V_10M",

            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-17",
              cloudCoverage: 21,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-18",
              cloudCoverage: 24,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-19",
              cloudCoverage: 19,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-20",
              cloudCoverage: 9,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-27",
              cloudCoverage: 38,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-03",
              cloudCoverage: 22,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-10",
              cloudCoverage: 51,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-17",
              cloudCoverage: 14,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-21",
              cloudCoverage: 29,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-22",
              cloudCoverage: 27,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-23",
              cloudCoverage: 26,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-24",
              cloudCoverage: 29,
            },
          ],
          timeControlProperty: "TIME",
        },
        source: {
          type: "TileWMS",
          url: "https://services.sentinel-hub.com/ogc/wms/0635c213-17a1-48ee-aef7-9d1731695a54",
          params: {
            LAYERS: "AWS_NO2-VISUALISATION",
            TIME: "2022-12-05",
          },
          crossOrigin: "anonymous",
        },
      },
    ],
  });

  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrolDate, {
    format: "D. MMMM YYYY",
  });
</script>

```

#### DateWithNavigation

Date display component with navigation buttons for stepping through available dates
This example shows the `<eox-timecontrol-date>` component with the `navigation` property enabled,
which adds previous/next buttons to step through available dates. Clicking these buttons will
automatically update the selected date range and apply it to the map layers.

```html
<eox-timecontrol for="eox-map#date-with-navigation">
  <eox-timecontrol-date></eox-timecontrol-date>
</eox-timecontrol>
<eox-map id="date-with-navigation"></eox-map>

<script type="module">
  import "@eox/timecontrol/dist/eox-timecontrol.js";
  import "@eox/map/dist/eox-map.js";

  const eoxTimecontrol = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol");
  const eoxMap = document.querySelector("eox-map");
  const eoxTimecontrolDate = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol-date");

  // Assign properties
  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrol, {
    layerIdKey: "id",
  });

  Object.assign(eoxMap, {
    zoom: 5,
    center: [1000000, 6000000],
    layers: [
      {
        type: "Tile",
        properties: {
          id: "OSM",
        },
        source: {
          type: "OSM",
        },
      },
      {
        type: "Tile",
        properties: {
          id: "AWS_VIS_WIND_V_10M",
          name: "Wind Visualisation 10M",
          timeControlValues: [
            {
              date: "2022-12-05",
              cloudCoverage: 20,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-07",
              cloudCoverage: 68,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-08",
              cloudCoverage: 72,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-09",
              cloudCoverage: 65,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-10",
              cloudCoverage: 58,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-11",
              cloudCoverage: 61,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-12",
              cloudCoverage: 55,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-13",
              cloudCoverage: 63,
            },
            {

              date: "2023-02-02",

    format: "YYYY-MM-DD",
    navigation: true,

```

#### Expert

Expert example showcasing all timecontrol features together
This comprehensive example demonstrates all available timecontrol components and features:
- Date display with navigation
- Calendar picker in popup mode with dots
- Range slider for date selection
- Timeline visualization
- Timelapse export functionality
- Date filtering
This example serves as a reference for building complex time navigation interfaces with
multiple interaction methods and visualization options.

```html
<eox-timecontrol for="eox-map#external-map-rendering-mosaic">
  <eox-timecontrol-date></eox-timecontrol-date>
  <eox-timecontrol-picker></eox-timecontrol-picker>
  <eox-timecontrol-timeline></eox-timecontrol-timeline>
  <eox-timecontrol-timelapse></eox-timecontrol-timelapse>
  <eox-itemfilter></eox-itemfilter>
</eox-timecontrol>
<eox-map id="external-map-rendering-mosaic"></eox-map>

<script type="module">
  import "@eox/timecontrol/dist/eox-timecontrol.js";
  import "@eox/map/dist/eox-map.js";
  import "@eox/itemfilter/dist/eox-itemfilter.js";

  const eoxTimecontrol = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol");
  const eoxMap = document.querySelector("eox-map");
  const eoxTimecontrolDate = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol-date");
  const eoxTimecontrolPicker = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol-picker");
  const eoxTimecontrolTimeline = document.querySelector(
    "eox-timecontrol-timeline",
  );
  const eoxTimecontrolTimelapse = document.querySelector(
    "eox-timecontrol-timelapse",
  );
  const eoxItemfilter = document.querySelector("eox-itemfilter");

  // Assign properties
  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrol, {
    layerIdKey: "id",
    titleKey: "name",
    filters: [
      {
        key: "cloudCoverage",
        title: "Cloud Coverage",
        type: "range",
        expanded: true,
        min: 0,
        max: 100,
        step: 5,
        state: {
          min: 0,
          max: 40,
        },
      },
    ],
    externalMapRendering: true,
    animate: true,
    select: (e) => {
      console.log(e.detail);
    },
  });

  Object.assign(eoxMap, {
    zoom: 10,
    center: [12, 42],
  });

  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrolDate, {
    navigation: true,
  });

  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrolPicker, {
    range: true,
    showDots: true,
    popup: true,
  });
</script>

```

#### ExternalMapRendering

External map rendering mode for timelapse export with custom map rendering logic
This example demonstrates the `externalMapRendering` feature, which allows custom handling
of map layer updates for timelapse export. When enabled, the timecontrol dispatches an
`export` event with detailed information about selected items, allowing external code to
handle the map rendering and snapshot generation.
This is useful when you need custom control over how map layers are rendered for each
time step, or when using map rendering services that require special handling.

```html
<eox-timecontrol for="eox-map#external-map-rendering-mosaic">
  <eox-timecontrol-timeline></eox-timecontrol-timeline>
  <eox-timecontrol-date></eox-timecontrol-date>
  <eox-timecontrol-picker></eox-timecontrol-picker>
</eox-timecontrol>
<eox-map id="external-map-rendering-mosaic"></eox-map>

<script type="module">
  import "@eox/timecontrol/dist/eox-timecontrol.js";
  import "@eox/map/dist/eox-map.js";

  const eoxTimecontrol = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol");
  const eoxMap = document.querySelector("eox-map");
  const eoxTimecontrolTimeline = document.querySelector(
    "eox-timecontrol-timeline",
  );
  const eoxTimecontrolDate = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol-date");
  const eoxTimecontrolPicker = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol-picker");

  // Assign properties
  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrol, {
    layerIdKey: "id",
    titleKey: "name",
    externalMapRendering: true,
    animate: true,
    select: (e) => {
      console.log(e.detail);
    },
  });

  Object.assign(eoxMap, {
    zoom: 10,
    center: [12, 42],
  });

  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrolDate, {
    navigation: true,
  });

  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrolPicker, {
    range: true,
    showDots: true,
    showItems: true,
    popup: true,
  });
</script>

```

#### NoMap

No map story
This example demonstrates the timecontrol component without a map. The component can be used
standalone by providing `controlValues` directly instead of linking to a map via the `for` attribute.
This is useful when you want to use timecontrol for date selection without map integration.

```html
<eox-timecontrol>
  <eox-timecontrol-date></eox-timecontrol-date>
  <eox-timecontrol-picker></eox-timecontrol-picker>
  <eox-timecontrol-timeline></eox-timecontrol-timeline>
  <eox-timecontrol-slider></eox-timecontrol-slider>
  <eox-itemfilter></eox-itemfilter>
</eox-timecontrol>

<script type="module">
  import "@eox/timecontrol/dist/eox-timecontrol.js";

  const eoxTimecontrol = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol");
  const eoxTimecontrolDate = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol-date");
  const eoxTimecontrolPicker = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol-picker");
  const eoxTimecontrolTimeline = document.querySelector(
    "eox-timecontrol-timeline",
  );
  const eoxTimecontrolSlider = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol-slider");
  const eoxItemfilter = document.querySelector("eox-itemfilter");

  // Assign properties
  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrol, {
    layerIdKey: "id",
    titleKey: "name",
    filters: [
      {
        key: "cloudCoverage",
        title: "Cloud Coverage",
        type: "range",
        expanded: true,
        min: 0,
        max: 100,
        step: 5,
        state: {
          min: 0,
          max: 40,
        },
      },
    ],
    navigation: true,
    popup: true,
    position: ["bottom", "left"],
    select: (e) => {
      console.log(e.detail);
    },
  });

  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrolDate, {
    format: "YYYY-MM-DD",
    navigation: true,
  });

  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrolPicker, {
    format: "YYYY-MM-DD",
    showDots: true,
    popup: true,
    position: ["bottom", "left"],
  });
</script>

```

#### OnlyDate

@param {Object.<string, unknown>} args **/ (args) => html`
<eox-timecontrol
.for=${args.for}
.layerIdKey=${args.layerIdKey}
.titleKey=${args.titleKey}
.externalMapRendering=${args.externalMapRendering}
></eox-timecontrol>
`,
};
/**
Basic timecontrol rendered using only the date display component
This renders a timecontrol element with just the `<eox-timecontrol-date>` component, which displays
the currently selected date(s) from the associated map layers. The date is automatically extracted
from layers that have `timeControlValues` and `timeControlProperty` properties.
The component links to an `<eox-map>` instance using the `for` attribute, which can be either a
selector string (e.g., `"eox-map#primary"`) or a direct reference to the map element.

```html
<eox-timecontrol for="eox-map#only-date">
  <eox-timecontrol-date></eox-timecontrol-date>
</eox-timecontrol>
<eox-map id="only-date"></eox-map>

<script type="module">
  import "@eox/timecontrol/dist/eox-timecontrol.js";
  import "@eox/map/dist/eox-map.js";

  const eoxTimecontrol = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol");
  const eoxMap = document.querySelector("eox-map");
  const eoxTimecontrolDate = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol-date");

  Object.assign(eoxMap, {
    zoom: 5,
    center: [1000000, 6000000],
    layers: [
      {
        type: "Tile",
        properties: {
          id: "OSM",
        },
        source: {
          type: "OSM",
        },
      },
      {
        type: "Tile",
        properties: {
          id: "AWS_VIS_WIND_V_10M",
          name: "Wind Visualisation 10M",
          timeControlValues: [
            {
              date: "2022-12-05",
              cloudCoverage: 20,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-07",
              cloudCoverage: 68,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-08",
              cloudCoverage: 72,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-09",
              cloudCoverage: 65,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-10",
              cloudCoverage: 58,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-11",
              cloudCoverage: 61,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-12",
              cloudCoverage: 55,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-13",
              cloudCoverage: 63,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-01",
              cloudCoverage: 33,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-02",
              cloudCoverage: 28,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-03",
              cloudCoverage: 31,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-04",
              cloudCoverage: 36,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-05",
              cloudCoverage: 42,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-06",
              cloudCoverage: 38,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-07",
              cloudCoverage: 34,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-08",
              cloudCoverage: 40,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-09",
              cloudCoverage: 45,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-10",
              cloudCoverage: 39,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-01",
              cloudCoverage: 52,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-02",
              cloudCoverage: 48,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-03",
              cloudCoverage: 55,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-04",
              cloudCoverage: 61,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-05",
              cloudCoverage: 58,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-06",
              cloudCoverage: 64,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-07",
              cloudCoverage: 59,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-08",
              cloudCoverage: 67,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-09",
              cloudCoverage: 71,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-10",
              cloudCoverage: 68,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-11",
              cloudCoverage: 73,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-12",
              cloudCoverage: 69,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-13",
              cloudCoverage: 75,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-14",
              cloudCoverage: 72,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-15",
              cloudCoverage: 66,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-16",
              cloudCoverage: 70,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-17",
              cloudCoverage: 74,
            },
          ],
          timeControlProperty: "TIME",
        },
        source: {
          type: "TileWMS",
          url: "https://services.sentinel-hub.com/ogc/wms/0635c213-17a1-48ee-aef7-9d1731695a54",
          params: {
            LAYERS: "AWS_VIS_WIND_V_10M",
            TIME: "2022-12-05",
          },
          crossOrigin: "anonymous",
        },
      },
      {
        type: "Tile",
        properties: {
          id: "AWS_NO2-VISUALISATION",
          name: "NO2 Visualisation",
          timeControlValues: [
            {
              date: "2022-12-05",
              cloudCoverage: 20,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-06",
              cloudCoverage: 18,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-07",
              cloudCoverage: 22,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-08",
              cloudCoverage: 25,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-09",
              cloudCoverage: 19,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-10",
              cloudCoverage: 16,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-11",
              cloudCoverage: 21,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-12",
              cloudCoverage: 15,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-19",
              cloudCoverage: 35,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-26",
              cloudCoverage: 8,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-16",
              cloudCoverage: 42,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-17",
              cloudCoverage: 38,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-18",
              cloudCoverage: 45,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-19",
              cloudCoverage: 41,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-20",
              cloudCoverage: 39,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-21",
              cloudCoverage: 43,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-22",
              cloudCoverage: 37,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-23",
              cloudCoverage: 28,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-24",
              cloudCoverage: 31,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-25",
              cloudCoverage: 26,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-26",
              cloudCoverage: 29,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-27",
              cloudCoverage: 24,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-28",
              cloudCoverage: 32,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-29",
              cloudCoverage: 27,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-30",
              cloudCoverage: 12,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-31",
              cloudCoverage: 14,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-01",
              cloudCoverage: 11,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-02",
              cloudCoverage: 16,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-03",
              cloudCoverage: 13,
            },
            {

            },

              date: "2023-02-05",
              cloudCoverage: 15,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-06",
              cloudCoverage: 55,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-13",
              cloudCoverage: 33,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-14",

            {
              date: "2023-02-15",

            {
              date: "2023-02-16",

            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-17",
              cloudCoverage: 34,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-18",
              cloudCoverage: 31,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-19",
              cloudCoverage: 35,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-20",
              cloudCoverage: 29,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-21",
              cloudCoverage: 32,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-22",
              cloudCoverage: 27,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-23",
              cloudCoverage: 33,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-24",
              cloudCoverage: 25,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-25",
              cloudCoverage: 28,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-26",
              cloudCoverage: 22,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-27",
              cloudCoverage: 18,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-06",
              cloudCoverage: 47,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-13",
              cloudCoverage: 25,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-14",
              cloudCoverage: 28,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-15",
              cloudCoverage: 23,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-16",
              cloudCoverage: 26,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-17",
              cloudCoverage: 21,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-18",
              cloudCoverage: 24,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-19",
              cloudCoverage: 19,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-20",
              cloudCoverage: 9,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-27",
              cloudCoverage: 38,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-03",
              cloudCoverage: 22,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-10",
              cloudCoverage: 51,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-17",
              cloudCoverage: 14,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-21",
              cloudCoverage: 29,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-22",
              cloudCoverage: 27,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-23",
              cloudCoverage: 26,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-24",
              cloudCoverage: 29,
            },
          ],
          timeControlProperty: "TIME",
        },
        source: {
          type: "TileWMS",
          url: "https://services.sentinel-hub.com/ogc/wms/0635c213-17a1-48ee-aef7-9d1731695a54",
          params: {
            LAYERS: "AWS_NO2-VISUALISATION",
            TIME: "2022-12-05",
          },
          crossOrigin: "anonymous",
        },
      },
    ],
  });

  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrolDate, {
    format: "YYYY-MM-DD",
  });
</script>

```

#### Slider

Range slider for selecting date ranges with visual indicators for years and months
This example demonstrates the `<eox-timecontrol-slider>` component, which provides a visual
range slider for selecting start and end dates. The slider displays tick marks for years and
months, and tooltips show the formatted dates when hovering over or dragging the handles.
The slider automatically extracts available dates from timeline items and allows users to
select a date range by dragging the handles. The selected range is immediately applied to
the map layers.

```html
<eox-timecontrol for="eox-map#slider">
  <eox-timecontrol-date></eox-timecontrol-date>
  <eox-timecontrol-picker></eox-timecontrol-picker>
  <eox-timecontrol-slider></eox-timecontrol-slider>
</eox-timecontrol>
<eox-map id="slider"></eox-map>

<script type="module">
  import "@eox/timecontrol/dist/eox-timecontrol.js";
  import "@eox/map/dist/eox-map.js";

  const eoxTimecontrol = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol");
  const eoxMap = document.querySelector("eox-map");
  const eoxTimecontrolDate = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol-date");
  const eoxTimecontrolPicker = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol-picker");
  const eoxTimecontrolSlider = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol-slider");

  // Assign properties
  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrol, {
    layerIdKey: "id",
  });

  Object.assign(eoxMap, {
    zoom: 5,
    center: [1000000, 6000000],
    layers: [
      {
        type: "Tile",
        properties: {
          id: "OSM",
        },
        source: {
          type: "OSM",
        },
      },
      {
        type: "Tile",
        properties: {
          id: "AWS_VIS_WIND_V_10M",
          name: "Wind Visualisation 10M",
          timeControlValues: [
            {
              date: "2022-12-05",
              cloudCoverage: 20,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-07",
              cloudCoverage: 68,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-08",
              cloudCoverage: 72,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-09",
              cloudCoverage: 65,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-10",
              cloudCoverage: 58,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-11",
              cloudCoverage: 61,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-12",
              cloudCoverage: 55,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-13",
              cloudCoverage: 63,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-01",
              cloudCoverage: 33,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-02",
              cloudCoverage: 28,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-03",
              cloudCoverage: 31,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-04",
              cloudCoverage: 36,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-05",
              cloudCoverage: 42,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-06",
              cloudCoverage: 38,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-07",
              cloudCoverage: 34,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-08",
              cloudCoverage: 40,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-09",
              cloudCoverage: 45,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-10",
              cloudCoverage: 39,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-01",
              cloudCoverage: 52,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-02",
              cloudCoverage: 48,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-03",
              cloudCoverage: 55,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-04",
              cloudCoverage: 61,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-05",
              cloudCoverage: 58,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-06",
              cloudCoverage: 64,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-07",
              cloudCoverage: 59,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-08",
              cloudCoverage: 67,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-09",
              cloudCoverage: 71,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-10",
              cloudCoverage: 68,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-11",
              cloudCoverage: 73,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-12",
              cloudCoverage: 69,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-13",
              cloudCoverage: 75,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-14",
              cloudCoverage: 72,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-15",
              cloudCoverage: 66,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-16",
              cloudCoverage: 70,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-17",
              cloudCoverage: 74,
            },
          ],
          timeControlProperty: "TIME",
        },
        source: {
          type: "TileWMS",
          url: "https://services.sentinel-hub.com/ogc/wms/0635c213-17a1-48ee-aef7-9d1731695a54",

              cloudCoverage: 31,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-19",
              cloudCoverage: 35,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-20",
              cloudCoverage: 29,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-21",
              cloudCoverage: 32,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-22",
              cloudCoverage: 27,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-23",
              cloudCoverage: 33,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-24",
              cloudCoverage: 25,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-25",
              cloudCoverage: 28,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-26",
              cloudCoverage: 22,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-27",
              cloudCoverage: 18,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-06",
              cloudCoverage: 47,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-13",
              cloudCoverage: 25,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-14",
              cloudCoverage: 28,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-15",
              cloudCoverage: 23,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-16",
              cloudCoverage: 26,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-17",
              cloudCoverage: 21,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-18",
              cloudCoverage: 24,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-19",
              cloudCoverage: 19,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-20",
              cloudCoverage: 9,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-27",
              cloudCoverage: 38,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-03",
              cloudCoverage: 22,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-10",
              cloudCoverage: 51,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-17",
              cloudCoverage: 14,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-21",
              cloudCoverage: 29,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-22",
              cloudCoverage: 27,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-23",
              cloudCoverage: 26,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-24",
              cloudCoverage: 29,
            },
          ],
          timeControlProperty: "TIME",
        },
        source: {
          type: "TileWMS",
          url: "https://services.sentinel-hub.com/ogc/wms/0635c213-17a1-48ee-aef7-9d1731695a54",
          params: {
            LAYERS: "AWS_NO2-VISUALISATION",
            TIME: "2022-12-05",
          },
          crossOrigin: "anonymous",
        },
      },
    ],
  });

  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrolDate, {
    format: "YYYY-MM-DD",
    navigation: true,
  });

  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrolPicker, {
    showDots: true,
    popup: true,
  });

  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrolSlider, {
    animateOnClickInterval: "0.3s",
  });
</script>

```

#### Timeline

Timeline visualization using vis-timeline with date picker and calendar integration
This example shows the full power of the timecontrol component with the `<eox-timecontrol-timeline>`
component. The timeline displays timeline items as milestones grouped by layer, allowing users
to visualize time-based data across multiple layers.
Features demonstrated:
- Timeline visualization with groups and items
- Date picker with dots indicating available data (`showDots` attribute)
- Date display with navigation buttons
- Range selection via custom time markers on the timeline
- Click events on timeline items to select specific dates
The timeline automatically syncs with the date picker and other components, providing a
comprehensive time navigation interface.

```html
<eox-timecontrol for="eox-map#timeline">
  <eox-timecontrol-timeline></eox-timecontrol-timeline>
  <eox-timecontrol-date></eox-timecontrol-date>
  <eox-timecontrol-picker></eox-timecontrol-picker>
</eox-timecontrol>
<eox-map id="timeline"></eox-map>

<script type="module">
  import "@eox/timecontrol/dist/eox-timecontrol.js";
  import "@eox/map/dist/eox-map.js";

  const eoxTimecontrol = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol");
  const eoxMap = document.querySelector("eox-map");
  const eoxTimecontrolTimeline = document.querySelector(
    "eox-timecontrol-timeline",
  );
  const eoxTimecontrolDate = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol-date");
  const eoxTimecontrolPicker = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol-picker");

  // Assign properties
  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrol, {
    layerIdKey: "id",
    select: (e) => {
      console.log(e.detail);
    },
  });

  Object.assign(eoxMap, {
    zoom: 5,
    center: [1000000, 6000000],
    layers: [
      {
        type: "Tile",
        properties: {
          id: "OSM",
        },
        source: {
          type: "OSM",
        },
      },
      {
        type: "Tile",
        properties: {
          id: "AWS_VIS_WIND_V_10M",
          name: "Wind Visualisation 10M",
          timeControlValues: [
            {
              date: "2022-12-05",
              cloudCoverage: 20,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-07",
              cloudCoverage: 68,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-08",
              cloudCoverage: 72,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-09",
              cloudCoverage: 65,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-10",
              cloudCoverage: 58,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-11",
              cloudCoverage: 61,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-12",
              cloudCoverage: 55,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-13",
              cloudCoverage: 63,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-01",
              cloudCoverage: 33,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-02",
              cloudCoverage: 28,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-03",
              cloudCoverage: 31,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-04",
              cloudCoverage: 36,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-05",
              cloudCoverage: 42,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-06",
              cloudCoverage: 38,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-07",
              cloudCoverage: 34,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-08",
              cloudCoverage: 40,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-09",
              cloudCoverage: 45,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-10",
              cloudCoverage: 39,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-01",
              cloudCoverage: 52,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-02",
              cloudCoverage: 48,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-03",
              cloudCoverage: 55,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-04",
              cloudCoverage: 61,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-05",
              cloudCoverage: 58,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-06",
              cloudCoverage: 64,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-07",
              cloudCoverage: 59,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-08",
              cloudCoverage: 67,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-09",
              cloudCoverage: 71,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-10",
              cloudCoverage: 68,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-11",
              cloudCoverage: 73,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-12",
              cloudCoverage: 69,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-13",
              cloudCoverage: 75,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-14",
              cloudCoverage: 72,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-15",
              cloudCoverage: 66,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-16",
              cloudCoverage: 70,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-17",
              cloudCoverage: 74,
            },
          ],
          timeControlProperty: "TIME",
        },
        source: {
          type: "TileWMS",
          url: "https://services.sentinel-hub.com/ogc/wms/0635c213-17a1-48ee-aef7-9d1731695a54",
          params: {
            LAYERS: "AWS_VIS_WIND_V_10M",
            TIME: "2022-12-05",
          },
          crossOrigin: "anonymous",
        },
      },
      {
        type: "Tile",
        properties: {
          id: "AWS_NO2-VISUALISATION",
          name: "NO2 Visualisation",
          timeControlValues: [
            {
              date: "2022-12-05",
              cloudCoverage: 20,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-06",
              cloudCoverage: 18,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-07",
              cloudCoverage: 22,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-08",
              cloudCoverage: 25,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-09",
              cloudCoverage: 19,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-10",
              cloudCoverage: 16,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-11",
              cloudCoverage: 21,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-12",
              cloudCoverage: 15,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-19",
              cloudCoverage: 35,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-26",
              cloudCoverage: 8,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-16",
              cloudCoverage: 42,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-17",
              cloudCoverage: 38,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-18",
              cloudCoverage: 45,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-19",
              cloudCoverage: 41,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-20",
              cloudCoverage: 39,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-21",
              cloudCoverage: 43,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-22",
              cloudCoverage: 37,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-23",
              cloudCoverage: 28,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-24",
              cloudCoverage: 31,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-25",
              cloudCoverage: 26,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-26",
              cloudCoverage: 29,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-27",
              cloudCoverage: 24,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-28",
              cloudCoverage: 32,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-29",
              cloudCoverage: 27,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-30",
              cloudCoverage: 12,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-01-31",
              cloudCoverage: 14,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-01",
              cloudCoverage: 11,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-02",
              cloudCoverage: 16,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-03",
              cloudCoverage: 13,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-04",
              cloudCoverage: 18,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-05",

            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-17",
              cloudCoverage: 34,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-18",
              cloudCoverage: 31,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-19",
              cloudCoverage: 35,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-20",
              cloudCoverage: 29,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-21",
              cloudCoverage: 32,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-22",
              cloudCoverage: 27,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-23",
              cloudCoverage: 33,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-24",
              cloudCoverage: 25,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-25",
              cloudCoverage: 28,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-26",
              cloudCoverage: 22,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-27",
              cloudCoverage: 18,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-06",
              cloudCoverage: 47,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-13",
              cloudCoverage: 25,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-14",
              cloudCoverage: 28,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-15",
              cloudCoverage: 23,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-16",
              cloudCoverage: 26,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-17",
              cloudCoverage: 21,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-18",
              cloudCoverage: 24,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-19",
              cloudCoverage: 19,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-20",
              cloudCoverage: 9,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-27",
              cloudCoverage: 38,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-03",
              cloudCoverage: 22,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-10",
              cloudCoverage: 51,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-17",
              cloudCoverage: 14,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-21",
              cloudCoverage: 29,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-22",
              cloudCoverage: 27,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-23",
              cloudCoverage: 26,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-24",
              cloudCoverage: 29,
            },
          ],
          timeControlProperty: "TIME",
        },
        source: {
          type: "TileWMS",
          url: "https://services.sentinel-hub.com/ogc/wms/0635c213-17a1-48ee-aef7-9d1731695a54",
          params: {
            LAYERS: "AWS_NO2-VISUALISATION",
            TIME: "2022-12-05",
          },
          crossOrigin: "anonymous",
        },
      },
    ],
  });

  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrolDate, {
    navigation: true,
  });

  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrolPicker, {
    showDots: true,
    popup: true,
    showItems: true,
  });
</script>

```

#### TimelineSelectionDuration

Timeline visualization with custom selection duration
This example demonstrates the `selectionDuration` property, which allows defining the
default selection duration (if no item is clicked).
It strictly supports native dayjs duration formats (e.g., `{ months: 1 }`, `"P1M"`, or `100` for milliseconds).

```html
<eox-timecontrol for="eox-map#timeline-selection-duration">
  <eox-timecontrol-timeline></eox-timecontrol-timeline>
</eox-timecontrol>
<eox-map id="timeline-selection-duration"></eox-map>

<script type="module">
  import "@eox/timecontrol/dist/eox-timecontrol.js";
  import "@eox/map/dist/eox-map.js";

  const eoxTimecontrol = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol");
  const eoxMap = document.querySelector("eox-map");
  const eoxTimecontrolTimeline = document.querySelector(
    "eox-timecontrol-timeline",
  );

  // Assign properties
  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrol, {
    layerIdKey: "id",
  });

  Object.assign(eoxMap, {
    zoom: 5,
    center: [1000000, 6000000],
    layers: [
      {
        type: "Tile",
        properties: {
          id: "OSM",
        },
        source: {
          type: "OSM",
        },
      },
      {
        type: "Tile",
        properties: {
          id: "AWS_VIS_WIND_V_10M",
          name: "Wind Visualisation 10M",
          timeControlValues: [
            {
              date: "2022-12-05",
              cloudCoverage: 20,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-07",
              cloudCoverage: 68,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-08",
              cloudCoverage: 72,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-09",
              cloudCoverage: 65,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-10",
              cloudCoverage: 58,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-11",
              cloudCoverage: 61,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-12",
              cloudCoverage: 55,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-13",
              cloudCoverage: 63,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-01",
              cloudCoverage: 33,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-02",
              cloudCoverage: 28,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-03",
              cloudCoverage: 31,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-04",
              cloudCoverage: 36,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-05",
              cloudCoverage: 42,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-06",
              cloudCoverage: 38,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-07",
              cloudCoverage: 34,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-08",
              cloudCoverage: 40,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-09",
              cloudCoverage: 45,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-10",
              cloudCoverage: 39,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-01",
              cloudCoverage: 52,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-02",
              cloudCoverage: 48,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-03",
              cloudCoverage: 55,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-04",
              cloudCoverage: 61,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-05",
              cloudCoverage: 58,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-06",
              cloudCoverage: 64,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-07",
              cloudCoverage: 59,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-08",
              cloudCoverage: 67,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-09",
              cloudCoverage: 71,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-10",
              cloudCoverage: 68,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-11",
              cloudCoverage: 73,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-12",
              cloudCoverage: 69,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-13",
              cloudCoverage: 75,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-14",
              cloudCoverage: 72,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-15",
              cloudCoverage: 66,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-16",
              cloudCoverage: 70,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-17",
              cloudCoverage: 74,
            },
          ],
          timeControlProperty: "TIME",
        },
        source: {
          type: "TileWMS",
          url: "https://services.sentinel-hub.com/ogc/wms/0635c213-17a1-48ee-aef7-9d1731695a54",
          params: {
            LAYERS: "AWS_VIS_WIND_V_10M",
            TIME: "2022-12-05",
          },
          crossOrigin: "anonymous",
        },
      },
      {
        type: "Tile",

          name: "NO2 Visualisation",
          timeControlValues: [
            {
              date: "2022-12-05",
              cloudCoverage: 20,

            {
              date: "2022-12-06",
              cloudCoverage: 18,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-07",
              cloudCoverage: 22,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-08",
              cloudCoverage: 25,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-09",
              cloudCoverage: 19,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-10",
              cloudCoverage: 16,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-11",
              cloudCoverage: 21,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-12",
              cloudCoverage: 15,

              cloudCoverage: 34,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-18",
              cloudCoverage: 31,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-19",
              cloudCoverage: 35,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-20",
              cloudCoverage: 29,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-21",
              cloudCoverage: 32,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-22",
              cloudCoverage: 27,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-23",
              cloudCoverage: 33,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-24",
              cloudCoverage: 25,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-25",
              cloudCoverage: 28,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-26",
              cloudCoverage: 22,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-27",
              cloudCoverage: 18,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-06",
              cloudCoverage: 47,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-13",
              cloudCoverage: 25,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-14",
              cloudCoverage: 28,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-15",
              cloudCoverage: 23,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-16",
              cloudCoverage: 26,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-17",
              cloudCoverage: 21,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-18",
              cloudCoverage: 24,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-19",
              cloudCoverage: 19,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-20",
              cloudCoverage: 9,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-03-27",
              cloudCoverage: 38,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-03",
              cloudCoverage: 22,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-10",
              cloudCoverage: 51,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-17",
              cloudCoverage: 14,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-21",
              cloudCoverage: 29,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-22",
              cloudCoverage: 27,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-23",
              cloudCoverage: 26,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-24",
              cloudCoverage: 29,
            },
          ],
          timeControlProperty: "TIME",
        },
        source: {
          type: "TileWMS",
          url: "https://services.sentinel-hub.com/ogc/wms/0635c213-17a1-48ee-aef7-9d1731695a54",
          params: {
            LAYERS: "AWS_NO2-VISUALISATION",
            TIME: "2022-12-05",
          },
          crossOrigin: "anonymous",
        },
      },
    ],
  });

  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrolTimeline, {
    selectionDuration: {
      months: 1,
    },
  });
</script>

```

#### TimelineSelectionResizable

Timeline visualization with non-resizable selection
This example demonstrates the `selectionResizable` property. If enabled, the selected
range can be modified by the user. If false (as shown here), then the user can **not**
modify the range.

```html
<eox-timecontrol for="eox-map#timeline-selection-resizable">
  <eox-timecontrol-timeline></eox-timecontrol-timeline>
</eox-timecontrol>
<eox-map id="timeline-selection-resizable"></eox-map>

<script type="module">
  import "@eox/timecontrol/dist/eox-timecontrol.js";
  import "@eox/map/dist/eox-map.js";

  const eoxTimecontrol = document.querySelector("eox-timecontrol");
  const eoxMap = document.querySelector("eox-map");
  const eoxTimecontrolTimeline = document.querySelector(
    "eox-timecontrol-timeline",
  );

  // Assign properties
  Object.assign(eoxTimecontrol, {
    layerIdKey: "id",
  });

  Object.assign(eoxMap, {
    zoom: 5,
    center: [1000000, 6000000],
    layers: [
      {
        type: "Tile",
        properties: {
          id: "OSM",
        },
        source: {
          type: "OSM",
        },
      },
      {
        type: "Tile",
        properties: {
          id: "AWS_VIS_WIND_V_10M",
          name: "Wind Visualisation 10M",
          timeControlValues: [
            {
              date: "2022-12-05",
              cloudCoverage: 20,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-07",
              cloudCoverage: 68,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-08",
              cloudCoverage: 72,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-09",
              cloudCoverage: 65,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-10",
              cloudCoverage: 58,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-11",
              cloudCoverage: 61,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-12",
              cloudCoverage: 55,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-13",
              cloudCoverage: 63,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-01",
              cloudCoverage: 33,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-02",
              cloudCoverage: 28,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-03",
              cloudCoverage: 31,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-04",
              cloudCoverage: 36,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-05",
              cloudCoverage: 42,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-06",
              cloudCoverage: 38,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-07",
              cloudCoverage: 34,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-08",
              cloudCoverage: 40,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-09",
              cloudCoverage: 45,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-02-10",
              cloudCoverage: 39,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-01",
              cloudCoverage: 52,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-02",
              cloudCoverage: 48,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-03",
              cloudCoverage: 55,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-04",
              cloudCoverage: 61,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-05",
              cloudCoverage: 58,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-06",
              cloudCoverage: 64,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-07",
              cloudCoverage: 59,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-08",
              cloudCoverage: 67,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-09",
              cloudCoverage: 71,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-10",
              cloudCoverage: 68,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-11",
              cloudCoverage: 73,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-12",
              cloudCoverage: 69,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-13",
              cloudCoverage: 75,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-14",
              cloudCoverage: 72,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-15",
              cloudCoverage: 66,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-16",
              cloudCoverage: 70,
            },
            {
              date: "2023-04-17",
              cloudCoverage: 74,
            },
          ],
          timeControlProperty: "TIME",
        },
        source: {
          type: "TileWMS",
          url: "https://services.sentinel-hub.com/ogc/wms/0635c213-17a1-48ee-aef7-9d1731695a54",
          params: {
            LAYERS: "AWS_VIS_WIND_V_10M",
            TIME: "2022-12-05",
          },
          crossOrigin: "anonymous",
        },
      },
      {
        type: "Tile",
        properties: {
          id: "AWS_NO2-VISUALISATION",
          name: "NO2 Visualisation",
          timeControlValues: [
            {
              date: "2022-12-05",
              cloudCoverage: 20,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-06",
              cloudCoverage: 18,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-07",
              cloudCoverage: 22,
            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-08",

            {
              date: "2022-12-09",

            },
            {
              date: "2022-12-10",

            {

            {

            {
              date: "2023-01-24",

            {
              date: "2023-01-25",
```
